===''Pokémon Horizons: The Series''===
{{main|Iono (anime)}}
Iono is an energetic and eccentric streamer, just like her game counterpart. She is close friends with [[Dot]], often helping her and encouraging her throughout {{aniseries|HZ}}. Iono first appeared in ''[[HZ015|Someone We Can't See! Whosawhatsit?]]'', where she assisted Dot in finding [[Liko]] by turning the search into a game. She continues to support Dot during her {{pkmn|journey}}, offering guidance both as a friend and a collaborator.

Iono helps boost Dot's confidence in battles, like when she proposes that Dot fight as Nidothing and later faces her in a battle during [[Tera Training]]. Although Iono wins, she praises Dot's growth as a {{pkmn|Trainer}}. The two also partner in the [[Elite Four Tag Battle]], where Iono takes the lead during Dot's moments of hesitation, ultimately winning the battle together. Iono frequently interacts with Dot through video calls and livestreams, maintaining a playful and supportive relationship.

Overall, Iono is a mischievous, tech-savvy influencer who encourages her friend while also using her platform to create engaging content. Her kindness and playfulness shine through as she fosters Dot's development both in and out of battle.
